title: acer polymorphum sanguineum
intro: Acer polymorphum sanguineum, also known as the Sanguine Maple or Blood Maple, is a species of maple tree that belongs to the Sapindaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acer polymorphum sanguineum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
